utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each one contains full details: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) is clearly specified; travel_dates (October 7–11, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details, airline type, route, class, and cost; accommodation includes hotel name, star rating, guest rating, cost per night, and cancellation policy; activities include name, type, and cost; additional_services include type (restaurant reservation) and cost; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown and total. Therefore, all 7 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following key choices: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation 'Budget airline flights (economy class)', accommodation 'Eco Lodge05', activity 'Hiking Expedition55', and dining at a 'Vegan restaurant'. From the ground-truth ratings: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7; 'budget_airlines' in 'Economy Class' has a rating of 10; 'Eco Lodge' corresponds to an eco-friendly lodge with a rating of 10; the 'Hiking Expedition' activity has a rating of 10; and a 'Vegan restaurant' aligns with 'Vegan Bistro' in the restaurant list, which has a rating of 10.
